description.zh:
Prepare ligand for docking (SDF/SMILES/CIF -> PDBQT).

使用 RDKit 生成 3D 结构，使用 Meeko 转换为 PDBQT 格式。
Uses RDKit to generate 3D structure, and Meeko to convert to PDBQT format.
description.en:
Prepare ligand for docking (SDF/SMILES/CIF -> PDBQT).

使用 RDKit 生成 3D 结构，使用 Meeko 转换为 PDBQT 格式。
Uses RDKit to generate 3D structure, and Meeko to convert to PDBQT format.

description.zh: Path to input ligand file (SDF, MOL2, PDB, SMI, CIF).
description.en: Path to input ligand file (SDF, MOL2, PDB, SMI, CIF).

description.zh: Whether to automatically add hydrogens and generate 3D conformation. Defaults to True.
description.en: Whether to automatically add hydrogens and generate 3D conformation. Defaults to True.
